category_sources: source_facts.description says CP2K is a quantum chemistry and solid state physics software package; official CP2K docs and manual cover CP2K scientific simulation use.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cp2k; official site and manual use the uppercase project name CP2K.
docs_sources: Official cp2k.org docs page and official manual.cp2k.org manual are dedicated documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/cp2k/cp2k; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies quantum chemistry and solid state physics; source_facts.executables list CP2K binaries; official manual provides CP2K input documentation.
